case_title: CHRISTOPHER FLEMING SMITH VS. TRANSMART, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER FLEMING SMITH. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ALEXIS WONG ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND CO-DEFENDANT TRANSMART, INC. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS ON TRANSMART, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF EXAMINATION-OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 03/20/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANSMART, INC. WONG, ALEXIS

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ALEXIS WONG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 AT 8:30 AM. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, ALEXIS WONG, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT TRANSMART, INC. WONG, ALEXIS

DECLARATION OF WITNESS NATALIE LEUNG, MARKETING SPECIALIST FOR TRANSMART INC. FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANSMART, INC. WONG, ALEXIS
